items.name: theme-moderno
items.title: Theme Moderno
items.description: The default Moderno brand: near-black monochrome workspace with sharp corners. Defines the contract slots in :root (light) and .dark (dark).

items.name: theme-contrast
items.title: Theme Contrast
items.description: Synthetic maximum-contrast brand scoped under [data-brand="contrast"], composed with .dark. Demonstrates the multi-brand switch.

items.name: button
items.title: Button (eject)
items.description: Ejected copy of the @moderno/react Button primitive. Use only when you must own the markup; styling still comes from @moderno/css.

items.name: login-form-react
items.title: Login Form (React)
items.description: Sign-in card composing the @moderno/react Field and Button primitives.

items.name: login-form-vue
items.title: Login Form (Vue)
items.description: Sign-in card composing the @moderno/vue Field and Button primitives.

items.name: login-form-svelte
items.title: Login Form (Svelte)
items.description: Sign-in card composing the @moderno/svelte Field and Button primitives.

items.name: login-form-solid
items.title: Login Form (Solid)
items.description: Sign-in card composing the @moderno/solid Field and Button primitives.

items.name: pricing-react

items.description: Three-plan pricing section composing the @moderno/react Button primitive.

items.name: empty-state-react
